_comment: Copy to options.json and fill in. options.json is gitignored (it holds the localKey + apiKey). Only the 'sauna' block plus a server.apiKey are needed for basic local control; 'sonos' and 'apns' are optional.

sonos._comment: Optional — controls a Sonos by name; delete this block if you have no Sonos.
sonos.name: Sauna

apns._comment: Optional — Live Activity push. Leave enabled=false to skip. sandbox=true for dev/Xcode builds, false only for TestFlight/App Store. p8Path /data/... is the Docker mount; for a native install use an absolute path like /opt/emberd/AuthKey.p8.

server._comment: apiKey: a long random string, then required as 'Authorization: Bearer <key>' on mutating routes. null = auth OFF (dev only — anyone on the network can power the heater). The bind host/port are set in deploy/emberd.service + Dockerfile, not here. debugEndpoints exposes /debug/* (raw DP dump + arbitrary DP write) — keep false in production.
